title: Perform a partial water change
description: Learn how to remove dirty water and refill your tank with conditioned water.

dialogue.text: Regular water changes keep your fish healthy. Let's remove about 25% of the water.

options.text: Got it. How do I start?

dialogue.text: Use a siphon to vacuum debris while draining into a bucket. Stop when you've removed about a quarter of the volume.
Refill slowly with dechlorinated water that's close to the tank's temperature.

options.text: Tank refilled and fish are happy!
